fields.name: question
fields.label: Question
fields.placeholder: e.g. "In one sentence, what is a Petri net?"

data.label: Internal Pool Agent
data.description: A single-shot (degenerate, no-tools, maxTurns 1) Agent bound to a self-hosted model served through the in-cluster inference router. The wire `provider` is `openai` (OpenAI-compatible router path), `model` is the loaded model id curated in the `internal_pool_registry`, and `resourceAlias` binds the `internal_pool_router` (`internal_llm`) resource whose `base_url` overlays the router endpoint at fire time — so the inference HTTP call goes base_url→router and is NEVER net-admitted. In the editor this surfaces as provider `internal` with a loaded-set Model picker and locked base_url/api_key overrides (GDPR — an internal binding cannot silently escape off-router).
data.systemPrompt: You are a concise assistant. Answer in a single sentence.
